subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled with the fire of the love of God! According to thy letter, thou hast resolved to journey unto the Ancient House [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتعل بنار محبت الله از قرار نامه آنجناب عازم بیت الله العتیق شده اید و
subcodes.subjects: @rejection of Muhammad, @episodes from the early history of Islam, @pilgrimage [Hajj] in Islam, @humility; meekness; lowliness
